channel.title: Electronics on Low Tech Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Electronics on Low Tech Lab

item.title: Ordinateur Low-tech
item.description: A basic computer model that nevertheless meets most of our daily needs. All for a price not exceeding 30 euros! Create an affordable, functional desktop computer using a Raspberry Pi and salvaged components for basic office tasks, web browsing, and simple multimedia use.

item.title: Powerbank Simple
item.description: A straightforward external battery designed to power small LED lighting or recharge smartphones, built from recycled lithium-ion cells extracted from old laptop batteries.
